generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring position of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox measuring position of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current of the permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller sending position, speed, or acceleration commands to control the robot axes"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance GearWheelGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox in MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Motor encoder position data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Secondary encoder position data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
    base:desc "Input current data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data trace from MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLMBSEEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from motor encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from motor current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLMBSEEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLMBSEEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box data-driven friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASAssetDescription : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLMBSEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering in digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation and modeling of friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot axis control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous friction identification using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of robot axis data via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through control algorithm adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyEnhancementAction
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters used to adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis data for monitoring purposes"
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control algorithms based on friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    base:contains Motor, GearWheelGearbox, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SINUMERIKController
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS), visualized in a unified dashboard for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, covering wear and operational changes over the robot's lifetime."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison of simulated data against measured data to detect friction deviations, with model parameters refined based on observed discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time transmission of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per IEC 62897, SysML (ISO/IEC 19505), UML for modeling."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Physical safety cell restricts working range to [-90°, 90°], but no DT-specific security or safety mechanisms described."
]
